home.title: Welcome to
home.subtitle: A safe space where people connect, share stories, and support each other. Join our community to empower and be empowered through shared experiences and collective strength.

about.title: About Us
about.privacySafetyDesc: We prioritize the privacy and safety of all our users, providing a secure environment where you can share and seek support anonymously.
about.safeCommunityDesc: EmpowerH provides a supportive platform where individuals can connect, communicate, and support each other in a respectful and safe environment.
about.empowerEveryoneDesc: Our mission is to empower all individuals worldwide by providing resources, support, and a voice to those affected by violence and mental health challenges.
about.intro: EmpowerH is a comprehensive platform dedicated to addressing sexual and gender-based violence (SGBV), domestic abuse, and mental health challenges. We understand that some stories are too heavy to carry alone. That's why we've created this sanctuary—a safe space where you can share your experiences, seek support, and connect with others who've walked similar paths.
about.missionDesc: We recognize that many individuals face barriers—fear, shame, or societal pressure—that prevent them from speaking out. But every voice deserves to be heard. By providing a confidential and anonymous reporting system, mental health support services, and educational resources, we empower survivors and break the silence surrounding violence and mental health struggles.
about.offer1: Anonymous reporting system for victims of violence
about.offer2: Professional mental health support and counseling
about.offer3: Educational resources on rights, legal awareness, and self-protection
about.offer4: Community forums for peer support and shared experiences
about.offer5: Wellness hub with health tips and resources
about.commitmentDesc: We are dedicated to providing a safe, supportive, and inclusive environment for all individuals, regardless of gender identity, sexual orientation, age, race, ethnicity, or background. Through our platform, we aim to create a community that fosters empathy, understanding, and growth. We believe that by sharing our stories and supporting one another, we can break down barriers, reduce stigma, and create a brighter future for everyone.
about.joinUs: Join us in creating a space where stories heal, hearts mend, and resilience blooms.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.intro: We're here to help! Whether you need more information about our services, have a query about your account, or just want to give us feedback, feel free to reach out. Our team is dedicated to providing you with the best possible support and will respond to your inquiries as soon as possible.
contact.subject: Subject
contact.hours:
MON - FRIDAY: 8 to 9 PM
SAT - SUN: 10 to 8 PM

footer.whyUsDesc: Join our community today and become part of a supportive network of people who empower and uplift each other. Together, let's create a brighter future for all.
footer.subscribeDesc: Subscribe to our mailing list to get the latest updates.

terms.title: Terms And Conditions
terms.acceptanceDesc: Welcome to EmpowerH. By accessing or using our platform, you agree to be bound by these Terms and Conditions ("Terms"). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use our services. We reserve the right to modify these Terms at any time, and continued use of the platform constitutes acceptance of any changes.

terms.thankYou: Thank you for being part of the EmpowerH community. Together, we can create a safer, more supportive world for everyone.
